The '''Battle of Red Rock''' took place on the planet [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], when [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] forces under the command of [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] ambushed and defeated a rogue [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] faction loyal to [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Grigor (governor)|Grigor]], before being repulsed by legitimate Imperial reinforcements.

Directed by the [[Gotal/Legends|Gotal]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Glott]] before his death, Governor Grigor's troops, supported by [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-STs]] and his own [[PX-4 Mobile Command Base]], located a Rebel camp at [[Red Rock]]. Although cautioned by one of his officers, Grigor opted to advance into the mountains, leading his forces into a trap. Rebel troops occupied the high ground and hit the Imperials with small arms fire and a barrage from well-placed [[1.4 FD P-Tower/Legends|1.4 FD P-Towers]]. Grigor's troops, largely [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] in [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] armor, were then cut down by [[Rebel trooper/Legends|Rebel infantry]]. Attempting to hold [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Mora]], the Rebel heir of the M'haeli royal family, hostage, Grigor died at the hands of former Imperial officer [[Ranulf Trommer/Legends|Ranulf Trommer]].<ref name="R4" />

However, the Rebel forces were forced to retreat as 'real' offworld Imperial reinforcements arrived, spearheaded by [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]] and led by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Lynch Hauser]]. Although the Grand Moff captured Mora, she was quickly rescued by Trommer, revealing his defection to the Rebel Alliance and escaping with their surviving forces.<ref name="R4" />
